text: @abbiezuena mbona wanatuogopa SISI NDIO SIFUNA😂juu Ruto ni yesu wao si wawache tutamsulubisha WANTAM ashamaliza siku zake duniani aende

@Lightcasttvke I am kikuyu and this is not the reason we are angry.We are angry because of the collapsing healthcare system,a collapsing economy , the death of young people because of police brutality.Being CS treasury how does it help luos from sleeping hungry ?

RT @calvinokello4: Gachagua's problem with Linda Mwananchi is that it is offering an alternative option to Mt. Kenya people. It is offering Kikuyus a broad support base wich Gachagua can not give. He can not allow them to be popular in Mt. Kenya.

@Dennis_Itumbi02 The tone you set is what the citizens are against. No one is against anyone getting what is rightfully theirs. Ruto has more Kikuyus Uhuru but Gachagua ndio mkabila. Mkaita wamama malaya na watoto chokora. Ni tabia zenyu watu hawapendi ndio tunasema malizeni muende na mtaenda.
@Adele_lide even if we give Ruto Luo 90 percent votes he would still loose

Oh gosh, who is your source? I bet it must be the cannibal Kukis. This video has nothing to do with what you've described. This is a video during MP election campaign at Western side of Tsngkhul Naga area in Manipur last year. Please don't take the advantage of Manipur violence and post unverified contents. Do even know the meaning of "Huinao?" It means baby dog or a puppy. I can't believe this post 😳
